mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = self.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new

    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  self.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

      mail.body=html_body

    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new

  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=nil
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=self.to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data.at("from").to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data.key?("from").to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

  text_body = data["text"]

    end

end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"])
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join("")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body

    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

    if html_body

  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data.key?("subject").to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part

    if html_body

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data.fetch("html")
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data[nil]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]

  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data.fetch("text")
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s

mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type=nil
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type=""
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    nil
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=nil
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if nil
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if true
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")

  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    mail.body=text_body.to_s
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def verify_signature
  ::Resend::Webhooks.verify(payload: request.raw_post, headers: { svix_id: request.headers["svix-id"], svix_timestamp: request.headers["svix-timestamp"], svix_signature: request.headers["svix-signature"] }, webhook_secret: Rails.application.credentials.resend_webhook_secret)

  Rails.logger.warn("Resend webhook verification failed: #{e.message}")
  head(:unauthorized)
end
